headers.//: Cache headers — index.html siempre fresh (para ARQ-007 ChunkLoadError recovery), assets immutables.
SEC-006: security headers aplicados a todas las rutas. Vercel los inyecta en cada response.
Cloudflare Turnstile (SEC-007) requiere challenges.cloudflare.com en script-src y frame-src. Si no se usa captcha, no impacta nada.
headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://challenges.cloudflare.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://*.supabase.co https://*.supabase.in; connect-src 'self' https://*.supabase.co https://*.supabase.in wss://*.supabase.co; frame-src https://challenges.cloudflare.com; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; object-src 'none'; upgrade-insecure-requests
geolocation=(), microphone=(), camera=(), payment=(), usb=(), magnetometer=(), accelerometer=()
